Family Owned & Operated

Building More Than Carts.

Legacy Cart Co. began as a father-and-sons project and grew into a business centered on craftsmanship, honest service and building something meaningful together.

Dan leads the builds with Colin “Big Dog” and Colson “Little Dude” never far from the action. Every cart is treated like it is being built for our own family.

Meet Legacy Cart Co.
